SessionStart.prompt: Check for untriaged tasks in my brain using the `list_tasks` tool with status 'untriaged'. If there are any, present them to me one at a time and ask if I want to: (1) work on this task now, (2) skip it for later, or (3) mark it as completed. Use the `complete_task` or `skip_task` tools accordingly. If there are no untriaged tasks, just say 'No untriaged tasks — you're all clear!' and continue.
